embeds.description:
**Map Name**: `arena`
**Map Size**: `42x26`
**1v1 Start Coords**: `S13` & `Y13`
Recommended for use as the main Colosseum.
Large elliptical arena, with a large variety of additional options to spice up your duels. (Optional rules for the variants is still being considered, and suggestions may be posted in <#694306844079947838>).

fields.name: Variants
fields.value:
`arena_night` ([link](https://a.l3n.co/i/YiFPpD.png)) - A night time version 
`arena_glow` ([link](https://c.l3n.co/i/YiUVnr.png)) - A dark version with blue glow
`arena_platform`  ([link](https://b.l3n.co/i/YiU9yF.png)) - A platform surrounded by pillars
`arena_columns` ([link](https://c.l3n.co/i/YiUqT3.png)) - Rows of columns for cover
`arena_arcane` ([link](https://c.l3n.co/i/YiU3Zq.png)) - Glowing arcane sigils and wards
`arena_hill` ([link](https://a.l3n.co/i/YiU4sA.png)) - A King of the Hill variant
`arena_air` ([link](https://b.l3n.co/i/YiUOQa.png)) - Wind swirls in the center
`arena_earth` ([link](https://a.l3n.co/i/YiUHne.png)) - Stone rubble provides obstacles and cover
`arena_fire` ([link](https://b.l3n.co/i/YiUl5k.png)) - Narrow corridors surrounded by flame
`arena_water` ([link](https://c.l3n.co/i/YiUSTx.md.png)) - Narrow walkways over water
